question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: verifySignatures()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the endDate check in verifySignatures() by injecting a balance file with a filename timestamp just before endDate so that downloaderProperties.setEnabled(false) is triggered after onVerified() is called, permanently disabling future verification while the attacker's file has already been committed?
